decisions.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI for trade secret theft; confirms Siri will switch to Google Gemini
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. CNBC confirmed the suit filed 2026-07-10 in N.D. Cal alleging OpenAI solicited Apple secrets via employee interviews; Apple also confirmed the fall Siri revamp runs on Google Gemini, not ChatGPT.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI launches GPT-Live full-duplex voice models
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. GPT-Live and GPT-Live mini launched 2026-07-08 with full-duplex listen-and-speak architecture.

decisions.title_en: ByteDance and Alibaba disable humanlike AI companion agents ahead of China's July 15 anthropomorphic-AI rules
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Qwen disabled humanlike agents 2026-07-10; Doubao offline 07-15; new Interim Measures on Anthropomorphic Interaction Services take effect 07-15.

decisions.title_en: Google delays Gemini 3.5 Pro to July 17, scraps base model for full rebuild
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Reported 2026-07-08: GA slips to 07-17, 2.5 Pro architecture scrapped for a from-scratch rebuild targeting math/coding gaps.

decisions.title_en: Grok 4.5 independent benchmarks: token-efficiency win but hallucination rate jumps to 54%
decisions.reason: Published 2026-07-09 as 'AI模型扎堆发布日' covering same-day flagship launches. New info: post-launch independent benchmarks — Grok 4.5 ranks #4 on Intelligence Index, uses ~4x fewer tokens than Opus 4.8, but hallucination rose from 25% to 54%. Title/summary constrained to this new reception.

decisions.title_en: Prime Intellect raises $130M Series A at $1B for decentralized open-training stack
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. $130M Series A led by Radical Ventures (NVIDIA Ventures, Intel Capital participating), $1B valuation, ~$100M ARR, 'Open Superintelligence Stack'.

decisions.title_en: European Commission presents EU Action Plan on Cybersecurity and AI
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. EC presented the plan 2026-07-07, ahead of AI Act transparency rules taking effect August 2026.

decisions.title_en: Norm AI raises $120M Series C at $1.2B for AI regulatory-compliance agents
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. $120M Series C led by Khosla Ventures, $1.2B valuation for a 3-year-old regulatory-compliance AI startup; event 2026-07-07 (5 days, within window).

decisions.title_en: Meta launches Meta Compute cloud unit
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-07-01 is 11 days old (>5 day limit).

decisions.title_en: Claude reaches GA on Azure AI Foundry via NVIDIA GB300
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-06-29 is 13 days old (>5 day limit).
event_date 2026-07-02/03 is 9-10 days old (>5 day limit).

decisions.title_en: Anthropic in talks with Microsoft to run Claude on Maia 200
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-05-21 far outside 5-day window; no new signed deal reported this week.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI confidentially files S-1 for IPO
Four senior Gemini researchers leave Google for Anthropic

decisions.reason: event_date 2026-07-01 is 11 days old (>5 day limit).

decisions.title_en: SambaNova closes $1B Series F at $11B valuation
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-08 as sambanova-series-f. No substantively new information.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic tops $30B run rate, expands Google/Broadcom compute to 3.5GW
decisions.reason: Aggregators recirculated this on 07-11, but the underlying revenue figure and 3.5GW deal were announced early April 2026 (>90 days).

decisions.title_en: SK Hynix closes +13% on Nasdaq debut day
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-10 as sk-hynix-nasdaq-debut. First-day close is market reaction to already-covered IPO; no substantive new development.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic announces Claude Corps nonprofit fellowship
decisions.reason: Low significance program announcement; deprioritized to keep the day focused on higher-impact items.
